questionHtml: State the function of the tap and reservoir.
markschemeHtml:
to reset the potometer
OR
move the air column to the right/end
OR
to replace/replenish water in tube ✔

Accept meniscus or air bubble as alternatives to column in all parts of question

meta.title: State the function of the tap and reservoir.
breadcrumbLabels: 9.1 Transport in the xylem of plants
